name: realmorphism-base
title: Realmorphism Base
description: Turnkey Realmorphism wrappers for shadcn/ui controls. Installs the theme dependency plus tactile primitives for buttons, cards, inputs, switches, toolbars, and tabs.
author: LT Lo TeknowledG

meta.doctrine: Use RealmorphismShell once near the root. Use realmorphism-action on controls where motion should communicate action availability.
meta.installNote: Install with `npx shadcn@latest add https://loteknowledG.github.io/realmorphism/registry/realmorphism-base.json` while Echo Mirage is serving locally.
